calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

KENNETH LARSON for PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
No appearance by Defendant KRISTINA BARNETT.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 4435 CALIFORNIA ST., SF, CA
The lease is forfeited.
RENTS & DAMAGES FOR (Feb, March, April, May of $1018.00 p/month) - $4072.00
Costs - $240.00
Total - $4312.00

Plaintiff to prepare judgment and submit to court for signature.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
